title: Unexpected syntax error on macro call with concatenation
body:
Hi,

I got an unexpected syntax error when parsing a macro call of which argument is concatenation like below.

```verilog
module test;
`define foo(v) \
$display("%h", v);
initial `foo({8'hab, 8'hcd})
endmodule
```

You will see the following error when you try to compile the above code.

```
$ iverilog test.v
test.v:4: error: too many arguments for `foo
test.v:5: syntax error
I give up.
```

iverilog version: 

```
$ iverilog -v
Icarus Verilog version 10.3 (stable) ()
```
